IPL 2026 Auction Sees ₹215.45 Cr Spent on 77 Stars

Dec 17, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

IPL 2026 Auction: Massive Spending and Strategic Moves

The IPL 2026 Auction witnessed record-breaking bids, with franchises collectively spending ₹215.45 crore on 77 players. Teams balanced immediate impact with long-term planning, highlighting evolving strategies and the value of versatile talent in shaping championship squads.
